args: $venvOk = (Test-Path .\venv\Scripts\python.exe) -and (Test-Path .\venv\Scripts\pip.exe); if (-not $venvOk) { if (Test-Path venv) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force venv }; python -m venv venv }; .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m ensurepip --upgrade; .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip; .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt

if [ ! -x venv/bin/python ] || [ ! -x venv/bin/pip ]; then rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv; fi && venv/bin/python -m ensurepip --upgrade && venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt

if [ ! -x venv/bin/python ] || [ ! -x venv/bin/pip ]; then rm -rf venv && python3 -m venv venv; fi && venv/bin/python -m ensurepip --upgrade && venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
